# Introducing Deep Research and Deep Research Max

Published: 2026-04-21T15:30:00+00:00
Type: Company-owned

## Summary

In December, Google released the Gemini Deep Research agent to developers, giving them access to its most advanced autonomous research capabilities. The integration of this agent and its integration with the Gemini 3.1 Pro allows developers to create exhaustive research workflows that blend the open web with their proprietary data streams for the first time.

Du Received AFOSR Award to Investigate Human-AI Metacognitive Alignment (April 2026) - ICIC Lab: Informatics, Cobots and Intelligent Construction Lab

The ICIC Lab is pleased to announce a $780,000 award from the Air Force Office of Scientific Research (AFOSR) to investigate human-AI metacognitive misalignment. Led by Dr. Eric Jing Du in collaboration with Dr. Brian Odegaard, this three-year initiative addresses a critical bottleneck in human-autonomy teaming: the systemic divergence between AI decision outcomes and their underlying cognitive processes. news_items.headline: Anthropic Opus 4.7 claims the top spot on the LLM Debate Benchmark with a flawless side-swapped record – Startup Fortune

# Anthropic Opus 4.7 claims the top spot on the LLM Debate Benchmark with a flawless side-swapped record – Startup Fortune

Published: 2026-04-21T07:33:31+05:30
Author: Elroy Fernandes

## Summary

Anthropic's Opus 4.7 (high) has taken first place on the LLM Debate Benchmark, the most rigorous public evaluation currently running for large language models, beating Sonnet 4.6 by 106 BT points and completing 51 side-swapped matchups without a single loss. # Loop Raises $95M Series C to Scale Its AI Platform Across the Supply Chain

Published: 2026-04-22T09:52:01+00:00
Author: James Dargan

## Summary

Loop, a full-stack AI platform for logistics and supply chains, has raised $95 million in Series C funding to expand its platform across broader enterprise use cases. The funding was led by Valor Equity Partners, with participation from Founders Fund, Index Ventures, J.P. Morgan Growth Equity Partners and others. Loop, a verticalized AI platform for logistics and supply chains, has raised $95m in a Series C funding round to expand its platform across a wider set of enterprise use cases and deepen its engineering capabilities. The round brings total funding to $29 million, following a $4 million seed led by BTV in spring of 2025.

news_items.headline: White House Framework Calls for Federal Preemption of State AI Laws
news_items.summary:
# White House Framework Calls for Federal Preemption of State AI Laws | Cranfill Sumner LLP - JDSupra

Published: 2026-04-21T21:08:38+00:00

## Summary

The White House has released a national legislative framework urging Congress to preempt state-level artificial intelligence (AI) laws that it believes are overly burdensome and inconsistent. The framework suggests a centralization of AI regulation at the federal level, following Executive Order 14365, entitled Ensuring a National Policy Framework for Artificial Intelligence, issued on December 11, 2025. news_items.headline: White House Unveils National AI Legislative Framework to Guide Federal Policy
news_items.summary:
# White House Unveils National AI Legislative Framework to Guide Federal Policy - CDO Magazine

Published: 2026-04-21T17:18:02+00:00

## Summary

The White House has released a national legislative framework aimed at shaping federal AI policy and guiding Congress towards comprehensive regulation of the technology. The framework includes key priorities such as child safety, intellectual property protections, free speech, innovation, and national security. It also urges Congress to avoid overly burdensome rules that could hinder innovation, while addressing risks such as harmful content, misuse
